2026-0483
2026-05-26ICBusiness Development Bank of Canada ActReappointment of the President of the Business Development Bank of CanadaReappointment of Isabelle Hudon of Verdun, Quebec, as President of the Business Development Bank of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective August 10, 2026.N/A
act: Business Development Bank of Canada Act
subject: Reappointment of the President of the Business Development Bank of Canada
precis: Reappointment of Isabelle Hudon of Verdun, Quebec, as President of the Business Development Bank of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years, effective August 10, 2026.
